title: Middle East Group: Unifying Multi-Country Vehicle Trading Operations
shortDescription: A Japanese vehicle trading group operating across Dubai, Oman, Libya, and North Africa needed a single view of logistics and intercompany transactions. With SAP Business One and the TransSync add-on, ALLE TECH unified operations across every location and gave leadership real-time visibility into trades.

title: Orbit Logistics: From Manual Tracking to End-to-End Warehouse Control
shortDescription: Orbit Logistics replaced error-prone manual processes with Freight Pulse, gaining a single system to manage requests, track shipments, receive goods, and pack outbound orders — cutting turnaround time across the warehouse.

title: United Colors: Scaling a Multi-Site Paint Manufacturer with SAP Business One
shortDescription: As a paint manufacturer and trader operating across Iraq, United Colors needed tighter control over production and distribution. SAP Business One gave them a single source of truth and measurably improved operational efficiency.

title: Explorations: Managing 150,000+ SKUs Across Multiple Locations
shortDescription: A vehicle spare parts distributor with an inventory of over 150,000 items struggled to keep trades consistent across branches. SAP Business One brought every location onto one platform, restoring control over inventory and trading.

title: Najm Properties: Connecting Real Estate Operations Through SAP Business One
shortDescription: ALLE TECH integrated SAP Business One with Najm Properties' existing systems, enabling seamless data flow between departments and a platform flexible enough to scale as the business grows.

title: Smart Electronics: Optimizing Field Sales with Van Sales
shortDescription: ALLE TECH's Van Sales solution gave Smart Electronics Company end-to-end control over logistics — from inbound and outbound shipments to sales rep assignments and in-app pricing and promotions.
